Home / Categories / Developer ToolsAI Coding Assistants

GitHub Copilot Review

GitHub Copilot is the AI pair programmer that changed how a generation of developers write code. It started as a tab-completion novelty and evolved into a multi-model coding assistant that can write entire functions, explain legacy code, and help with code review. It's not perfect, but it's hard to imagine going back to coding without it.

Visit GitHub Copilot →
Pricing$10/mo Individual / $19/mo Business
Rating★★★★½ 4.6/5
Best forsolo devs, developers, engineering teams

Pros & Cons

👍 Pros

  • Code suggestions are surprisingly accurate for boilerplate, tests, and common patterns across most languages
  • Multi-model support means you can switch between OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models depending on the task
  • Chat is context-aware and can reference your entire codebase, not just the open file
  • PR summaries are a genuine time-saver for busy teams reviewing changes
  • Integrates directly into VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim, and most major editors

👎 Cons

  • Can suggest code that looks right but has security vulnerabilities — you still need to review everything
  • Expensive for individual developers at $10/mo when free alternatives like Codeium exist
  • Requires a persistent internet connection; offline scenarios are painful
  • Sometimes gets chatty with irrelevant suggestions that interrupt your flow
  • Learning to prompt effectively takes time; raw output quality varies significantly by language and domain

Key Features

  • AI-powered code completion across all major languages
  • Chat with full codebase context awareness
  • PR description generation and code review assistance
  • Multi-model support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google)
  • Command-line copilot for terminal commands and git operations
  • Code fixes and refactoring suggestions

Best Use Cases

  • Speed up daily coding with intelligent tab completion
  • Generate tests, documentation, and boilerplate code instantly
  • Learn new languages or frameworks with contextual guidance
  • Review and refactor existing code with AI-powered suggestions

Compare with Alternatives

See how GitHub Copilot stacks up against: CursorSupabaseVercelBubblePostHog
